board_csa_architect.notes: Idempotent seed script is a standard deploy pattern. ON CONFLICT guard prevents data corruption on re-run.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: No hardcoded passwords — env var enforcement is correct. Well-known UUID enables deterministic RLS policy targeting.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: Draft agent slots with profile-later pattern aligns with REQ-L2-26 hydration pipeline. Clean separation of concerns.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: S effort is accurate — single file, transactional SQL, idempotency test. package.json script entry enables CI integration.
